case_title: PHILIP Q. KIELY VS. WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KIELY, PHILIP Q. AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($115.50 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAR-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIELY, PHILIP Q.
CORRESPONDENCE RE:CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY PLAINTIFF - NO OBJECTIONS RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "APPROVED" AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2011 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-13-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIELY, PHILIP Q. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
